problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: If Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
